name: galaxy-online-iii
description: MMO de estrategia espacial 4X inspirado en los clásicos del género

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:api: cd packages/database && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd ../../apps/api && npm run build
scripts.build:web: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../database && npx prisma generate && cd ../../apps/web && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/database && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd packages/database && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push:prod: cd packages/database && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/database && npx prisma db seed
